usage_rules.linkedin: Use 3-5 tags max. Lead with core, add 1-2 from the relevant boundary.
usage_rules.twitter: Use 2-3 tags. Keep it tight. #CommonGood always fits.
usage_rules.cv_site: Tags appear on project cards. Match identity_verified.md categories.
usage_rules.lane_rule: Never mix personal_studio tags with business tags in the same post.
